title: BEM-866 check after Claude patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
result = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
report = Path('governance/reports/bem865_claude_write_selftest.md')
result_text = result.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if result.exists() else ''
response_text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
report_text = report.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if report.exists() else ''
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in [line.strip() for line in response_text.splitlines()]
low = result_text.lower()
if ok:
    status = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK_CONFIRMED'
elif result.exists() and '"status": "dispatched"' in low:
    status = 'DISPATCHED_WAITING_CLAUDE_WRITE_AFTER_PATCH'
elif result.exists() and '"status": "dispatch_failed"' in low:
    status = 'DISPATCH_FAILED_AFTER_PATCH'
elif processed.exists():
    status = 'QUEUE_PROCESSED_NO_RESULT_AFTER_PATCH'
elif queue.exists():
    status = 'QUEUE_STILL_PENDING_AFTER_CLAUDE_PATCH'
else:
    status = 'QUEUE_MISSING_AFTER_CLAUDE_PATCH'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_CHECK_AFTER_CLAUDE_PATCH_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 check after Claude patch\nStatus: ' + status + '\nQueue exists: ' + str(queue.exists()) + '\nProcessed exists: ' + str(processed.exists()) + '\nResult exists: ' + str(result.exists()) + '\nResponse exists: ' + str(response.exists()) + '\nClaude write OK: ' + str(ok) + '\n\nResult text:\n' + result_text[:3000] + '\n\nResponse text:\n' + response_text[:2000] + '\n\nReport text:\n' + report_text[:2000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('check after Claude patch: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
